calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of The Filing Of A Receipt Of Funds Released From The Blocked Account To Titus Cameron After He Turns 18 Years Of Age.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Receipt For Deposit Of Money Into A Blocked Account
Off Calendar Feb-15-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-21-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Charles Katz, via ZOOM, for Keith Cameron, Executor.

The court and Mr. Katz discuss the issue of the executor paying attorney's fees and costs from the estate without prior court approval. Mr. Katz provides history of this matter and the related case re the estate of James Cameron and reports that his fees had been paid from the related matter and not this one. After additional discussion, the court informs Mr. Katz that he will be required to open a blocked account and the court summarizes the process to do so in open court.

After additional discussion, the Accounting Petition is submitted. A Status on Filing of Receipt for Deposit of Money Into a Blocked Account is set for Feb-15-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-18-2020 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-21-2020 Continued To Nov-18-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-23-2020 Continued To Oct-21-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Charles Katz appeared by zoom for and with Keith Cameron by zoom.

Mr. Katz stated that he filed a report before the last hearing, that he asked for a continuance to file a petition for final distribution, that it is ready to be filed and that he is asking that it be set in a couple of weeks. Mr. Katz also stated that he now knows that he has to call the document a petition, that he called it a request, that there is one final detail with regard to the order that suspended his Client's powers, that he was on a zoom call when the case was called, but the Court did not hear him and that it was his responsibility, not his Client's. The Court reinstated Mr. Cameron as the Executor of the estate. Mr. Katz is to prepare and provide an order. Status on close of estate is continued to October 21, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Katz to file either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration by October 14, 2020.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-26-2020 Continued To Sep-23-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance is made by counsel, parties or any interested persons.

At the first calendar call, no appearance is made. At the 10:55 a.m. calendar call. No appearance is made. The Court orders the suspension of the powers of the Executor, Keith Cameron and the suspension of the Executor's Letters Testamentary. An Order to Appear shall issue to the Executor, Keith Cameron, and his legal counsel, Charles Katz, Esq. to appear on September 23, 2020 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear at hearing on August 26, 2020 and why either no Petition to Approve Status of Administration or a Petition for Final Distribution has been filed. Notice of this Order shall be sent to the surety for the Executor.

This status hearing is continued to September 23, 2020 at 9:00 a.m.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
